data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Sleep Accessory (TRO-1578)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an inventor from St. Thomas, ON, Canada, shared their motivation behind creating the SHARK FIN, which addresses the need for a comfortable sleeping solution for individuals with back injuries. The inventor, who was involved in a severe car accident, sought a way to enhance side sleeping during the night without concerns. The invention aims to provide a supportive and worry-free experience for those facing similar challenges, showcasing innovation in addressing sleep comfort for individuals dealing with back injuries.

data.title: Caltech’s Harvey Newman and His Team Recognized with 2026 CENIC Innovations in Network Award for Experimental Applications
data.description: In La Mirada, California and San Francisco, a significant announcement was made by the Corporation for Education Network Initiatives in California (CENIC). The news revealed that the 2026 CENIC Innovations in Networking Award for Experimental Applications will be bestowed upon Caltech Professor of Physics, Harvey Newman, along with his team consisting of Preeti Bhat, Tom Hutton, John Graham, and Mohammad Sada. This prestigious award will be presented at CENIC’s biennial conference named "The Right Connection." The recognition highlights their exceptional contributions to the field.

data.title: Frank Wuerthwein & UC San Diego Team Recognized With 2026 CENIC AIR Award for Innovative Technical Design & Instructional Support
data.description: In La Mirada, California, and San Francisco, a recent announcement was made by the Corporation for Education Network Initiatives in California (CENIC). Frank Wuerthwein, the Executive Director of UC San Diego’s San Diego Supercomputer Center, along with his team, will receive the 2026 CENIC AIR Award for Innovative Technical Design & Instructional Support. This recognition will be given at CENIC’s upcoming biennial conference, "The Right Connection," scheduled for March 31–April 1, 2026, in Monterey, California.

data.title: JPMorgan faces lawsuit over $328M crypto 'Ponzi Scheme', accused of enabling fraud by negligence.
data.description: A legal action has been filed alleging that JPMorgan Chase did not take adequate measures to stop a customer from reportedly carrying out a significant cryptocurrency scam. The lawsuit asserts that the financial institution could have taken steps to prevent the fraud, which involved a substantial sum of money.

data.title: Jewelry industry sees surge in gold and silver prices, prompting shift to alternative materials and daring designs.
data.description: A growing number of jewelers are expanding their materials beyond traditional gems and metals, with some opting for wood, steel, and even platinum in their creations. In response to market fluctuations, some jewelers are embracing daring and larger designs to attract customers. This shift in the industry reflects a trend towards innovation and adaptability, with an increasing number of jewelers stepping outside the conventional boundaries to explore new avenues and capture consumer interest.

data.title: Tobacco Imagery Dominates Oscar®-Nominated Films, Raising Public Health Concerns Ahead of Hollywood's Biggest Night
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the Truth Initiative reveals that a significant 85% of young individuals have witnessed tobacco usage in the content they view. Interestingly, 43% of those who are intending to quit smoking expressed that the presence of such imagery makes their quitting process more challenging. This data provides crucial insights into the pervasive influence of tobacco depiction in media on young audiences. The survey's findings shed light on the need for increased awareness and action to address the impact of tobacco visibility in entertainment among the youth.

data.title: Spray-Net Expands into Boston Metro South, Setting a New Standard for Home Transformations
data.description: A former architect is introducing a new cabinet and exterior refinishing service for homeowners in Boston Metro South. The service, provided by Spray-Net, offers a high-performance solution for transforming homes. This innovative option will cater to local homeowners looking to renovate their properties efficiently. The launch of this service showcases the entrepreneur's transition from architecture to a successful business venture. Residents in the area can expect improved home aesthetics and quality through this new offering. The introduction of Spray-Net signifies a shift towards a more convenient and effective home improvement option for individuals in the Boston Metro South region. It presents an opportunity for homeowners to revamp their living spaces with a reliable and high-performing service.

data.title: Three Leaders at Echo Global Logistics Named to Food Logistics Rock Stars of the Supply Chain List
data.description: Echo Global Logistics, Inc. extended their congratulations to CEO Doug Waggoner, COO & President Dave Menzel, and EVP of Operations Frank Hurst in Chicago on March 12, 2026. The company is a top player in technology-driven transportation and supply chain management services, boasting impressive numbers in their field.

data.title: Tether invests in stablecoin infrastructure firm Ark Labs with $5.2M. Funding to boost faster issuance and settlement of digital assets.
data.description: The provided funding will aid in the creation of a programmable execution layer that aims to facilitate quicker issuance and settlement of digital assets on the platform.

data.title: BNB holders gained 177% returns in 15 months via Binance Rewards Stack, averaging 11.8% monthly from Jan 2024 to Q1 2025.
data.description: Data from Binance reveals that individuals holding BNB and engaging in Launchpool activities and airdrops saw a total return of 177% between January 2024 and the first quarter of 2025. On average, these participants earned 11.8% monthly during this period.

data.title: Travelzoo Wins Three Gold Awards at the Canadian Online Publishing Awards
data.description: Travelzoo®, a popular travel club traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol TZOO, recently achieved remarkable success at the 17th annual Canadian Online Publishing Awards (COPAs). The company secured three Gold awards at the prestigious event. One of the awarded categories was for their renowned Top 20® feature, which highlights exclusive travel deals in Canada. This recognition highlights Travelzoo's dedication to providing high-quality content and exceptional offers to travel enthusiasts.

data.title: New England Realty Associates LP Announces First-Quarter Distribution on Class A Units and Depositary Receipts
data.description: In Allston, Massachusetts, on March 12, 2026, it was announced that New England Realty Associates Limited Partnership (NYSE MKT: NEN) will be issuing its quarterly distribution on March 31, 2026, to its Class A Limited Partners and Depositary Receipt holders who are recorded as of March 24, 2026. This distribution is part of the regular quarterly cycle conducted by the company for its stakeholders.
